description: generate a publication-quality scientific diagram from a natural-language prompt via OpenRouter (Nano Banana 2 image generation + Gemini quality review with smart iterative refinement)
rules: read-only — only requests a render, mutates no remote/live service
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network access to openrouter.ai
image model is google/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview (Nano Banana 2); review model is google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview
DOC_TYPE sets the quality threshold (journal 8.5 .. presentation 6.5; default 7.5); regenerates only if below threshold
ITERATIONS capped at 2 by the core; smart early-stop when threshold is met
output diagram PNG and a <name>_review_log.json are written under record_store
usage: Set PROMPT (natural-language diagram description). Optional: DOC_TYPE (journal|conference|poster|presentation|report|grant|thesis|preprint|default), ITERATIONS (1-2), OUTPUT_NAME. Set OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: the named PNG plus its review-log JSON under record_store.
limitation: Network + valid OpenRouter API key required to actually render. Offline or without a key, the porter still produces the output file so the contract holds, but it will be empty/placeholder. Requires the python3 'requests' library at run time.

vars.PROMPT: CONSORT participant flow diagram: n=500 screened, n=150 excluded, n=350 randomized into two arms
